name: RBI IT Framework - Cryptographic Governance
requirement: Banks must maintain crypto inventory and PQC migration plan
relevance_to_pqc: Requires documentation of cryptographic controls. PQC migration must be documented.

name: RBI Cyber Security Framework
requirement: Vendor crypto risk assessment, incident reporting, continuous monitoring
relevance_to_pqc: Banks must assess cryptographic risks from vendors and third parties.

name: SEBI CSCRF - Crypto Inventory
authority: Securities and Exchange Board of India
requirement: Market intermediaries must inventory cryptographic dependencies (CBOM)
relevance_to_pqc: CBOM generation is directly relevant. First regulatory push for crypto inventory in India.

name: NPCI UPI - mTLS Requirement
requirement: UPI API endpoints must enforce mutual TLS authentication
relevance_to_pqc: mTLS certificates on UPI rail are quantum-vulnerable. Must track PQC migration for UPI endpoints.

name: SWIFT Customer Security Programme (CSP)
requirement: PQC readiness acknowledgement, secure messaging, key management
relevance_to_pqc: SWIFT has acknowledged quantum risk. CSP v2027 expected to mandate PQC readiness assessment.

name: PCI DSS 4.0 - TLS Minimum Version
requirement: Payment processing must enforce TLS 1.2+ with strong ciphers
relevance_to_pqc: TLS 1.2+ with forward secrecy mandated. Future PCI versions expected to address PQC.

name: IT Act 2000 / DPDP Act 2023
requirement: Data protection via strong cryptography, breach notification
relevance_to_pqc: DPDP Act mandates reasonable security practices. Quantum-vulnerable encryption may not qualify.

name: NIST PQC Standards (FIPS 203/204/205)
requirement: Finalized ML-KEM (FIPS 203), ML-DSA (FIPS 204), SLH-DSA (FIPS 205). Federal mandate by 2035.
relevance_to_pqc: Reference standards for PQC algorithm deployment worldwide.

name: NSA CNSA 2.0 Suite
requirement: Transition to PQC by 2030 for NSS systems, 2033 for software/firmware signing
relevance_to_pqc: US government timeline creates market pressure for all financial sector PQC adoption.
